violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (bagel) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room is lacking signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of black and brown debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Beans and chicken were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer gaskets have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The condensate from the soda/juice unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The ceiling in the food preparation area is in poor repair, observed exposed wood and installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

Inspector observed a cellphone being stored on a cutting board in the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
